历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 minimum rankings for science group: approximately 17037 → 8666 → 9409 → 6740 → 8153. Rankings shifted significantly forward from 2022 and stabilized, fluctuating between 6740 and 9409 in the last three years. 2025 baseline approximately 8153. Provincial science group enrollment: 2021: 51, 2022: 45, 2023: 50, 2024: 51, 2025: 63. 2026 physics category: 43 + medical category: 24, total 67, an increase of about 6.3% over 2025, slightly easing competition but limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university. Soft Science Chinese University Ranking 2026: 40th, stable in 38–40 range in recent years, a top national comprehensive university. 2026 reputation evaluation slightly positive; master's graduate thank-you letter to security department for tacitly allowing a scrap collector into campus and other humanistic care events widely disseminated. Douyin popularity ranking: 53rd (relatively hot), short video exposure medium-high, application attention steadily rising. No obvious admission cutoff gaps. Fifth round discipline evaluation: Grass Science A+, Ecology A+, Chemistry A-, Geography A-, Biology A-, total 5 A- and above disciplines. Grass Science and Ecology are national top-level, highly related to enrollment majors such as Grass Science, Geography Science, Biotechnology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering remain highly popular. Clinical Medicine, Stomatology stable and relatively hot. Majors related to Lanzhou University's strengths like Ecology and Grass Science have average popularity. Yunnan Province 2026 total Gaokao registrants approximately 377,900, an increase of about 32% over 2025 (approx. 285,700), significantly expanding candidate pool and intensifying competition. Lanzhou University located in Lanzhou, Gansu, Northwest China, geographically distant for Yunnan candidates in Southwest, causing some regional preference discount. The university's enrollment share in Yunnan about 1.0%–1.5%, moderately low, not a major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering historical rankings fluctuating between 6740–9409 in recent three years, 2026 enrollment expansion of about 6.3% but Yunnan candidate total growth of about 32%, school reputation slightly positive and Douyin popularity relatively hot, engineering majors' social popularity remaining high, it is expected that 2026 science group competition will slightly intensify compared to 2025, with rankings shifting slightly backward. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 8514, range 8014–9014.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 兰州大学医学类在云南省近五年最低录取位次分别为：2021年17037名（计划28人）、2022年8874名（计划25人）、2023年17126名（计划35人）、2024年16760名（计划30人）、 2025年16561名（计划30人）。2022年位次异常偏高（8874名），可能与当年医学类单独招生批次调整有关，其余四年位次稳定在16561–17126之间，整体呈缓慢下降趋势（位次数 字减小，竞争略缓和）。2026年医学类招生计划缩减至24人，较2025年的30人减少6人，缩招幅度约20%，对录取位次产生明显的下拉效应（位次数字减小，更易录取）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 兰州大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，位列国家985工程、211工程和双一流建设高校，办学历史悠久，综合实力雄厚。其医学学科依托学校整体平台，在西北地区具有较高的学 术声誉和影响力，临床医学、口腔医学等专业长期受到考生认可。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业历来是高考报考的热门方向，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。兰州大学地处甘肃兰州，虽地理位置相对偏远，但作为985高校的医学类专业，对云南省 考生仍具有较强吸引力。2026年云南省医学类招生规模整体保持稳定，但兰州大学医学类缩招20%，将进一步加剧核心专业的竞争程度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型与历年位次趋势，预测2026年兰州大学医学类在云南省的最低录取位次约为14774名，波动区间预计在14552–14996名之间。受2026年招生计划缩减20%的直接影 响，录取位次较2025年（16561名）预计下降约1787名（更易录取），但医学持续高热度的报考需求对位次下降幅度形成一定制约。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Lanzhou University's medical category in Yunnan Province over the past five years are: 2021: 17037 (planned 28 students), 2022: 8874 (planned 25 students), 2023: 17126 (planned 35 students), 2024: 16760 (planned 30 students), 2025: 16561 (planned 30 students). The ranking in 2022 was abnormally high (8874), possibly due to adjustments in the separate enrollment batch for medical categories that year. In the remaining four years, rankings stabilized between 16561 and 17126, showing a slow downward trend (smaller ranking numbers, slightly eased competition). In 2026, the enrollment plan for the medical category is reduced to 24 students, a decrease of 6 from 30 in 2025, a reduction of about 20%, which will have a significant downward effect on admission rankings (smaller ranking numbers, easier admission).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, listed among the national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction universities, with a long history and strong comprehensive strength. Its medical disciplines, supported by the university's overall platform, have high academic reputation and influence in the Northwest region, with clinical medicine, stomatology, and other majors long recognized by candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have always been a popular direction for college entrance exams, with core majors like clinical medicine and stomatology facing particularly intense competition. Although Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou, Gansu, a relatively remote area, as a 985 university's medical majors, it still holds strong appeal for candidates in Yunnan Province. In 2026, the overall scale of medical enrollment in Yunnan Province remains stable, but Lanzhou University's 20% reduction in medical enrollment will further intensify competition for core majors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Lanzhou University's medical category in Yunnan Province in 2026 is approximately 14774, with a fluctuation range expected between 14552 and 14996. Due to the direct impact of a 20% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the admission ranking is expected to drop by about 1787 (easier admission) compared to 2025 (16561), but the sustained high demand for medical majors will somewhat constrain the extent of the ranking drop.

The admission ranking for Nursing is significantly lower than other medical majors, making it an important safety choice for entering Lanzhou University's medical category.
